title: New Beginnings
caption: I joined Sodel in May 2022. Within a couple of months, we moved into a rented co-sharing workplace as the office was getting renovated. And when we finally returned in Nov, the place looked absolutely amazing! A fresh start with a fresh vibe.

images.caption: ..and here's the lunch plate that made the renovation even better!

title: वज्रमूठ
caption: Taking inspiration from the Shiv Sena, NCP and Congress 'Vajramuth' alliance, Sodel's very own Vajramuth came into existence with Kiran Bavdane, Rohan Dubey, and Ajay Shelar. Unlike its political counterpart, this alliance was built on friendship, fun, and plenty of office banter.

images.caption: 1. Rohan and Ajay convincing Kiran to be part of the gang.
2. Finally, the Vajramuth is formed! Didn't last long though.

title: Mutton Nights
caption: An evening at Vikas's place with the Coffee Group - delicious mutton prepared by Rohit, the bhakris I brought, a few drinks, and endless conversations. Simple moments like these, filled with laughter and good company, are the ones we wish happened more often.
